# Fault Stability

**Summary**: The assessment of whether faults can withstand pressure changes without slipping or dilating.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-maigana|Maigana, 2024]] performed fault-stability analysis to ensure seal integrity.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-maigana|Maigana, 2024]] Crucial for ensuring that injected CO does not escape through fractured zones.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- petrel
- geomechanics

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Faults showed a maximum slip tendency of 0.11% and were unlikely to provide pathways for CO migration. ([[2024-maigana|Maigana, 2024, p. 71]])
